ThingDef.label: EBR-14 (M14 EBR)
ThingDef.description: A modernized rifle built around a reinforced chassis system, improving stability and modularity. Its upgraded frame and enhanced ergonomics support controlled fire and consistent performance, adapting the platform for more demanding combat roles.

ThingDef.label: EBR-14 INF (M14 EBR)
ThingDef.description: A modernized rifle built around a reinforced chassis system, improving stability and modularity. Its upgraded frame and enhanced ergonomics support controlled fire and consistent performance, adapting the platform for more demanding combat roles. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: EBR-14 CQC (M14 EBR)
ThingDef.description: A modernized rifle built around a reinforced chassis system, improving stability and modularity. Its upgraded frame and enhanced ergonomics support controlled fire and consistent performance, adapting the platform for more demanding combat roles. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: EBR-14 SF (M14 EBR)
ThingDef.description: A modernized rifle built around a reinforced chassis system, improving stability and modularity. Its upgraded frame and enhanced ergonomics support controlled fire and consistent performance, adapting the platform for more demanding combat roles. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a suppressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: EBR-14 THM (M14 EBR)
ThingDef.description: A modernized rifle built around a reinforced chassis system, improving stability and modularity. Its upgraded frame and enhanced ergonomics support controlled fire and consistent performance, adapting the platform for more demanding combat roles. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: EBR-14 RF (M14 EBR)
ThingDef.description: A modernized rifle built around a reinforced chassis system, improving stability and modularity. Its upgraded frame and enhanced ergonomics support controlled fire and consistent performance, adapting the platform for more demanding combat roles. RF stands for Range Finder. This variant adds a Range Finding Device on the Scope that lase down a target and gives a range making for quicker target acquisition and better accuracy at the cost of... Cost.

ThingDef.label: EBR-14 SNP (M14 EBR)
ThingDef.description: A modernized rifle built around a reinforced chassis system, improving stability and modularity. Its upgraded frame and enhanced ergonomics support controlled fire and consistent performance, adapting the platform for more demanding combat roles. SNP stands for Sniper. Now you may be asking. Why is there a sniper variant when the thing is already a sniper? You still have to put a scope on otherwise it is just a regular rifle. This variants places a highpowered scope ontop of the weapon that excels at long range.

ThingDef.label: SP-R 208 (M24 SWS)
ThingDef.description: Built for deliberate, methodical shooting, this bolt-action rifle rewards patience and precision. Its operation is slower by design, trading volume of fire for exact shot placement and dependable performance at extended distances.

ThingDef.label: SP-R 208 INF (M24 SWS)
ThingDef.description: Built for deliberate, methodical shooting, this bolt-action rifle rewards patience and precision. Its operation is slower by design, trading volume of fire for exact shot placement and dependable performance at extended distances. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: SP-R 208 CQC (M24 SWS)
ThingDef.description: Built for deliberate, methodical shooting, this bolt-action rifle rewards patience and precision. Its operation is slower by design, trading volume of fire for exact shot placement and dependable performance at extended distances.

ThingDef.label: SP-R 208 SF (M24 SWS)
ThingDef.description: Built for deliberate, methodical shooting, this bolt-action rifle rewards patience and precision. Its operation is slower by design, trading volume of fire for exact shot placement and dependable performance at extended distances. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a suppressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: SP-R 208 THM (M24 SWS)
ThingDef.description: Built for deliberate, methodical shooting, this bolt-action rifle rewards patience and precision. Its operation is slower by design, trading volume of fire for exact shot placement and dependable performance at extended distances. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: SP-R 208 RF (M24 SWS)
ThingDef.description: Built for deliberate, methodical shooting, this bolt-action rifle rewards patience and precision. Its operation is slower by design, trading volume of fire for exact shot placement and dependable performance at extended distances. RF stands for Range Finder. This variant adds a Range Finding Device on the Scope that lase down a target and gives a range making for quicker target acquisition and better accuracy at the cost of... Cost.

ThingDef.label: SP-R 208 SNP (M24 SWS)
ThingDef.description: Built for deliberate, methodical shooting, this bolt-action rifle rewards patience and precision. Its operation is slower by design, trading volume of fire for exact shot placement and dependable performance at extended distances. SNP stands for Sniper. Now you may be asking. Why is there a sniper variant when the thing is already a sniper? You still have to put a scope on otherwise it is just a regular rifle. This variants places a highpowered scope ontop of the weapon that excels at long range.

ThingDef.label: Lockwood MK2 (Model 1885)
ThingDef.description: A single-shot rifle centered on simplicity and precision, requiring a full reload after every round. Its deliberate operation rewards careful aim, emphasizing accuracy and discipline over sustained fire.

ThingDef.label: Lockwood MK2 INF (Model 1885)
ThingDef.description: A single-shot rifle centered on simplicity and precision, requiring a full reload after every round. Its deliberate operation rewards careful aim, emphasizing accuracy and discipline over sustained fire.

ThingDef.label: Lockwood MK2 CQC (Model 1885)
ThingDef.description: A single-shot rifle centered on simplicity and precision, requiring a full reload after every round. Its deliberate operation rewards careful aim, emphasizing accuracy and discipline over sustained fire. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: Lockwood MK2 SF (Model 1885)
ThingDef.description: A single-shot rifle centered on simplicity and precision, requiring a full reload after every round. Its deliberate operation rewards careful aim, emphasizing accuracy and discipline over sustained fire. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a suppressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: Lockwood MK2 THM (Model 1885)
ThingDef.description: A single-shot rifle centered on simplicity and precision, requiring a full reload after every round. Its deliberate operation rewards careful aim, emphasizing accuracy and discipline over sustained fire. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: Lockwood MK2 RF (Model 1885)
ThingDef.description: A single-shot rifle centered on simplicity and precision, requiring a full reload after every round. Its deliberate operation rewards careful aim, emphasizing accuracy and discipline over sustained fire. RF stands for Range Finder. This variant adds a Range Finding Device on the Scope that lase down a target and gives a range making for quicker target acquisition and better accuracy at the cost of... Cost.

ThingDef.label: Lockwood MK2 SNP (Model 1885)
ThingDef.description: A single-shot rifle centered on simplicity and precision, requiring a full reload after every round. Its deliberate operation rewards careful aim, emphasizing accuracy and discipline over sustained fire. SNP stands for Sniper. Now you may be asking. Why is there a sniper variant when the thing is already a sniper? You still have to put a scope on otherwise it is just a regular rifle. This variants places a highpowered scope ontop of the weapon that excels at long range.

ThingDef.label: Lockwood MK2 Polymer (Model 1885)
ThingDef.description: A single-shot rifle centered on simplicity and precision, requiring a full reload after every round. Its deliberate operation rewards careful aim, emphasizing accuracy and discipline over sustained fire.

ThingDef.label: LM-S (PSG-1)
ThingDef.description: Engineered for precision above all else, this semi-automatic rifle focuses on stability and refined trigger control. Its design favors careful, measured shots, delivering consistent accuracy without relying on rapid follow-up fire.

ThingDef.label: LM-S INF (PSG-1)
ThingDef.description: Engineered for precision above all else, this semi-automatic rifle focuses on stability and refined trigger control. Its design favors careful, measured shots, delivering consistent accuracy without relying on rapid follow-up fire. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: LM-S CQC (PSG-1)
ThingDef.description: Engineered for precision above all else, this semi-automatic rifle focuses on stability and refined trigger control. Its design favors careful, measured shots, delivering consistent accuracy without relying on rapid follow-up fire.

ThingDef.label: LM-S SF (PSG-1)
ThingDef.description: Engineered for precision above all else, this semi-automatic rifle focuses on stability and refined trigger control. Its design favors careful, measured shots, delivering consistent accuracy without relying on rapid follow-up fire. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a suppressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: LM-S THM (PSG-1)
ThingDef.description: Engineered for precision above all else, this semi-automatic rifle focuses on stability and refined trigger control. Its design favors careful, measured shots, delivering consistent accuracy without relying on rapid follow-up fire. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: LM-S RF (PSG-1)
ThingDef.description: Engineered for precision above all else, this semi-automatic rifle focuses on stability and refined trigger control. Its design favors careful, measured shots, delivering consistent accuracy without relying on rapid follow-up fire. RF stands for Range Finder. This variant adds a Range Finding Device on the Scope that lase down a target and gives a range making for quicker target acquisition and better accuracy at the cost of... Cost.

ThingDef.label: LM-S SNP (PSG-1)
ThingDef.description: Engineered for precision above all else, this semi-automatic rifle focuses on stability and refined trigger control. Its design favors careful, measured shots, delivering consistent accuracy without relying on rapid follow-up fire. SNP stands for Sniper. Now you may be asking. Why is there a sniper variant when the thing is already a sniper? You still have to put a scope on otherwise it is just a regular rifle. This variants places a highpowered scope ontop of the weapon that excels at long range.

ThingDef.label: SA-B 50 (M700 PCR)
ThingDef.description: Engineered for precision above all else, this semi-automatic rifle focuses on stability and refined trigger control. Its design favors careful, measured shots, delivering consistent accuracy without relying on rapid follow-up fire.

ThingDef.label: SA-B 50 INF (M700 PCR)
ThingDef.description: Engineered for precision above all else, this semi-automatic rifle focuses on stability and refined trigger control. Its design favors careful, measured shots, delivering consistent accuracy without relying on rapid follow-up fire.

ThingDef.label: SA-B 50 CQC (M700 PCR)
ThingDef.description: Engineered for precision above all else, this semi-automatic rifle focuses on stability and refined trigger control. Its design favors careful, measured shots, delivering consistent accuracy without relying on rapid follow-up fire. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: SA-B 50 SF (M700 PCR)
ThingDef.description: Engineered for precision above all else, this semi-automatic rifle focuses on stability and refined trigger control. Its design favors careful, measured shots, delivering consistent accuracy without relying on rapid follow-up fire. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a suppressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: SA-B 50 THM (M700 PCR)
ThingDef.description: Engineered for precision above all else, this semi-automatic rifle focuses on stability and refined trigger control. Its design favors careful, measured shots, delivering consistent accuracy without relying on rapid follow-up fire. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: SA-B 50 RF (M700 PCR)
ThingDef.description: Engineered for precision above all else, this semi-automatic rifle focuses on stability and refined trigger control. Its design favors careful, measured shots, delivering consistent accuracy without relying on rapid follow-up fire. RF stands for Range Finder. This variant adds a Range Finding Device on the Scope that lase down a target and gives a range making for quicker target acquisition and better accuracy at the cost of... Cost.

ThingDef.label: SA-B 50 SNP (M700 PCR)
ThingDef.description: Engineered for precision above all else, this semi-automatic rifle focuses on stability and refined trigger control. Its design favors careful, measured shots, delivering consistent accuracy without relying on rapid follow-up fire. SNP stands for Sniper. Now you may be asking. Why is there a sniper variant when the thing is already a sniper? You still have to put a scope on otherwise it is just a regular rifle. This variants places a highpowered scope ontop of the weapon that excels at long range.

ThingDef.label: TAQ-M (SCAR20)
ThingDef.description: A precision-focused rifle built on a heavy, reinforced frame, designed to maintain stability during repeated fire. Its semi-automatic operation allows for rapid re-engagement while retaining strong accuracy, balancing power with controlled follow-through.

ThingDef.label: TAQ-M INF (SCAR20)
ThingDef.description: A precision-focused rifle built on a heavy, reinforced frame, designed to maintain stability during repeated fire. Its semi-automatic operation allows for rapid re-engagement while retaining strong accuracy, balancing power with controlled follow-through. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: TAQ-M CQC (SCAR20)
ThingDef.description: A precision-focused rifle built on a heavy, reinforced frame, designed to maintain stability during repeated fire. Its semi-automatic operation allows for rapid re-engagement while retaining strong accuracy, balancing power with controlled follow-through.

ThingDef.label: TAQ-M SF (SCAR20)
ThingDef.description: A precision-focused rifle built on a heavy, reinforced frame, designed to maintain stability during repeated fire. Its semi-automatic operation allows for rapid re-engagement while retaining strong accuracy, balancing power with controlled follow-through. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a suppressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: TAQ-M THM (SCAR20)
ThingDef.description: A precision-focused rifle built on a heavy, reinforced frame, designed to maintain stability during repeated fire. Its semi-automatic operation allows for rapid re-engagement while retaining strong accuracy, balancing power with controlled follow-through. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: TAQ-M RF (SCAR20)
ThingDef.description: A precision-focused rifle built on a heavy, reinforced frame, designed to maintain stability during repeated fire. Its semi-automatic operation allows for rapid re-engagement while retaining strong accuracy, balancing power with controlled follow-through. RF stands for Range Finder. This variant adds a Range Finding Device on the Scope that lase down a target and gives a range making for quicker target acquisition and better accuracy at the cost of... Cost.

ThingDef.label: TAQ-M SNP (SCAR20)
ThingDef.description: A precision-focused rifle built on a heavy, reinforced frame, designed to maintain stability during repeated fire. Its semi-automatic operation allows for rapid re-engagement while retaining strong accuracy, balancing power with controlled follow-through. SNP stands for Sniper. Now you may be asking. Why is there a sniper variant when the thing is already a sniper? You still have to put a scope on otherwise it is just a regular rifle. This variants places a highpowered scope ontop of the weapon that excels at long range.

ThingDef.label: Modern Crossbow (Reverse Draw)
ThingDef.description: A crossbow design that shifts the limbs forward, redistributing tension to increase bolt speed and reduce overall length. This layout improves balance and handling while delivering strong, silent impact with each shot.

ThingDef.label: Modern Crossbow INF (Reverse Draw)
ThingDef.description: A crossbow design that shifts the limbs forward, redistributing tension to increase bolt speed and reduce overall length. This layout improves balance and handling while delivering strong, silent impact with each shot.

ThingDef.label: Modern Crossbow CQC (Reverse Draw)
ThingDef.description: A crossbow design that shifts the limbs forward, redistributing tension to increase bolt speed and reduce overall length. This layout improves balance and handling while delivering strong, silent impact with each shot. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: Modern Crossbow SF (Reverse Draw)
ThingDef.description: A crossbow design that shifts the limbs forward, redistributing tension to increase bolt speed and reduce overall length. This layout improves balance and handling while delivering strong, silent impact with each shot. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a suppressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: Modern Crossbow THM (Reverse Draw)
ThingDef.description: A crossbow design that shifts the limbs forward, redistributing tension to increase bolt speed and reduce overall length. This layout improves balance and handling while delivering strong, silent impact with each shot. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: Tempus Torrent (SR-25)
ThingDef.description: Built for precision with the speed of a semi-automatic action, this rifle bridges the gap between careful marksmanship and rapid engagement. Its design allows accurate follow-up shots without sacrificing stability, making it effective across varying engagement distances.

ThingDef.label: Tempus Torrent INF (SR-25)
ThingDef.description: Built for precision with the speed of a semi-automatic action, this rifle bridges the gap between careful marksmanship and rapid engagement. Its design allows accurate follow-up shots without sacrificing stability, making it effective across varying engagement distances. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: Tempus Torrent CQC (SR-25)
ThingDef.description: Built for precision with the speed of a semi-automatic action, this rifle bridges the gap between careful marksmanship and rapid engagement. Its design allows accurate follow-up shots without sacrificing stability, making it effective across varying engagement distances. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: Tempus Torrent SF (SR-25)
ThingDef.description: Built for precision with the speed of a semi-automatic action, this rifle bridges the gap between careful marksmanship and rapid engagement. Its design allows accurate follow-up shots without sacrificing stability, making it effective across varying engagement distances. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a supressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficent.

ThingDef.label: Tempus Torrent THM (SR-25)
ThingDef.description: Built for precision with the speed of a semi-automatic action, this rifle bridges the gap between careful marksmanship and rapid engagement. Its design allows accurate follow-up shots without sacrificing stability, making it effective across varying engagement distances.

ThingDef.label: Tempus Torrent RF (SR-25)
ThingDef.description: Built for precision with the speed of a semi-automatic action, this rifle bridges the gap between careful marksmanship and rapid engagement. Its design allows accurate follow-up shots without sacrificing stability, making it effective across varying engagement distances. RF stands for Range Finder. This variant adds a Range Finding Device on the Scope that lase down a target and gives a range making for quicker target acquisition and better accuracy at the cost of... Cost.

ThingDef.label: Tempus Torrent SNP (SR-25)
ThingDef.description: Built for precision with the speed of a semi-automatic action, this rifle bridges the gap between careful marksmanship and rapid engagement. Its design allows accurate follow-up shots without sacrificing stability, making it effective across varying engagement distances. SNP stands for Sniper. Now you may be asking. Why is there a sniper variant when the thing is already a sniper? You still have to put a scope on otherwise it is just a regular rifle. This variants places a highpowered scope ontop of the weapon that excels at long range.
